item.title: Deadloch and Offspring actress Alicia Gardiner accused of ‘breaking the girl code’ in alleged assault
item.description: The actor has fronted a Melbourne court, charged over grabbing a security guard in a compromising spot.

item.title: Denise Richards and daughter Lola Sheen lead fresh tributes to Patrick Muldoon after ‘sudden’ death
item.description: Patrick Muldoon’s family said he was ‘suddenly taken from this Earth’ aged 57.

item.title: NBA superstar Victor Wembanyama suffers concussion in San Antonio’s shock playoffs loss to Portland
item.description: Victor Wembanyama laid on the floor for around 30 seconds before attempting to stagger to his feet.

item.title: Melbourne researchers develop world-first plastic that kills viruses on contact
item.description: The plastic could protect everything from mobile phones to hospital surfaces.

item.title: Chelsea sack manager Liam Rosenior amid worst goalscoring drought in over a century
item.description: The famous club has issued a statement just a day after another humiliating loss.

item.title: What Level 3 in Australia’s National Fuel Security Plan actually means, and how it could affect you
item.description: ‘We’ve got to prepare for the possibility that this will get worse before it gets better.’

item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns responds to Australians reportedly fuming over Anzac Day public holiday
item.description: The NSW premier has labelled the extra day off a ‘common sense change’ as other leaders face pressure to follow suit.

item.title: Oscar Piastri weighs in on F1 rival Max Verstappen’s situation: ‘Not a great look’
item.description: The Aussie says it will be a ‘big loss’ if the champion walks away from the sport.

item.title: Teen charged with killing Florida stepsister on cruise ship pleads not guilty
item.description: The 16-year-old is accused of murder and aggravated sexual assault.

item.title: John Mountain: Perth chef who clashed with Tash Peterson apologises after ‘stupid’ gang rape joke sparks fury
item.description: A popular chef and restaurant owner in Perth’s northern suburbs is under fire after using the term ‘gang rape’ in a social media post to describe a busy night at the venue.

item.title: Aussie Olympic legend Ariarne Titmus to boost Seven’s live and free Commonwealth Games coverage
item.description: The swimming great is thrilled she’ll no longer be the ‘worst looking person’ at the pool.

item.title: NSW father’s heartbreaking tribute after Meaghan Bowler, 32, allegedly murdered by husband in US
item.description: ‘She was just a beautiful, ambitious, kind, and trusting girl.’

item.title: Prince William and Princess Catherine share intimate family video as Prince Louis turns eight
item.description: The royals marked the special occasion with never-before-seen footage.

item.title: Townsville mum loses fallopian tube after alleged hospital neglect
item.description: After being sent home four times, she says a missed diagnosis turned into a life-altering emergency.

item.title: Meta and Microsoft slash thousands of jobs amid rise of artificial intelligence
item.description: The company says the cuts are for the sake of efficiency and to allow new investments in parts of its business.

item.title: Bizarre moment driver flees after apparent ‘ram raid’ on Supercars team Triple Eight Race Engineering’s Banyo HQ
item.description: CCTV footage showed the man’s ‘unbelievable’ effort to crash into the building - before his escape left a legend baffled.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: When Anthony Albanese plans to step down as Prime Minister as he warns of tough budget ahead
item.description: ‘Then I’ll know it is time to watch the footy every Saturday rather than do this job.’

item.title: Melbourne's 'butterfly boy' born with Epidermolysis Bullosa takes first steps after groundbreaking treatment
item.description: The four-year-old boy born with a rare genetic condition couldn't walk just months ago.

item.title: Anzac Day live updates: Middle East flight chaos blamed for lower attendance in Gallipoli
item.description: Around 1800 people gathered at the very place the first Anzacs landed.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of French Open in ‘painful’ blow for tennis
item.description: The superstar has issued a statement, saying it is ‘a difficult time for me’.

item.title: Aussie tennis star Alex de Minaur ‘embarrassed’ by rising teenager Rafael Jodar at Madrid Open
item.description: ‘He looked lost out there.’

item.title: ‘I will always be part of the royal family,’ Prince Harry said during whirlwind tour
item.description: Prince Harry says during a visit to Ukraine he is ‘doing the very thing that I was born to do’.

item.title: Former New Zealand cricketer Doug Bracewell banned for two years after failing ‘in-competition’ drugs test
item.description: ‘We are committed to supporting him through rehabilitation.’

item.title: Mounjaro, diabetes and weight loss drug, won't be listed on PBS after negotiations collapse
item.description: Around 450,000 Australians will continue paying hundreds of dollars a month for their medication.

item.title: Victorian motorists to pocket 20 per cent rebate on car registration to ease pain at the pump
item.description: Drivers in one state will receive the rebate to ease cost-of-living pressure as fuel prices soar across the country.

item.title: Pat Cummins cops rude welcome back to cricket from 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
item.description: The Australian got the last laugh over his ‘new favourite player’ in his first match since the Ashes.

item.title: Grand slam champion Iga Swiatek reduced to tears as ‘sad’ health battle forces Madrid Open retirement
item.description: ‘There is something going on’ and it’s taken down a key player just weeks out from the French Open.

item.title: Trump unharmed after shooting at correspondents' dinner
item.description: Donald Trump and other top US officials have been rushed out of the annual White House correspondents' dinner after an armed man stormed the lobby outside.

item.title: Capital gains tax discount could face biggest shake-up since 1999 - what could it mean for investors and home buyers?
item.description: Find out who stands to gain and who misses out under the proposed changes at budget time.

item.title: Australian surgeon explains the new ‘zombie filler’ trend using cadaver fat for cosmetic injections
item.description: An expert weighs in on whether the new beauty procedure is worth it.

item.title: Lisa Kudrow reveals 'mean' behaviour of Friends writers
item.description: She says the largely male writers became abusive if actors fluffed their lines and made the set an ‘intense’ place to be.

item.title: Angus Taylor blames overuse of welcome to country for Anzac Day boos
item.description: Angus Taylor has partly blamed ‘over-use’ of welcome to country ceremonies after Indigenous presenters were booed at Anzac Day dawn services, including in Perth.

item.title: Ronan Androgenic: Brisbane looksmaxxing influencer arrested during livestream
item.description: Ronan Androgenic has become a rising star among a generation increasingly obsessed with extreme beauty improvement.

item.title: Sam Neill reveals cancer battle and fight for life-saving treatment access
item.description: The Jurassic Park star is on a mission to help Australians access the treatment that gave him a second chance.

item.title: New washing machines to feature dual start function for child safety
item.description: The change follows a fatal accident in New Zealand in 2021.

item.title: Seasonal depression: The yearly blues hitting Australians as the temperature cools
item.description: Thousands of Australians are impacted as the mercury drops every year.

item.title: Trump shooting: How White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner transformed into chaos — and a crime scene
item.description: Guests were picking at salads when it became apparent the night had taken a turn.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Fresh uncertainty surrounds Sam Kerr’s Chelsea future after new comments from coach Sonia Bompastor
item.description: ‘Sam deserves what’s happening to her.’

item.title: Mel Schilling’s husband shares update on ‘next chapter’ following reality TV star’s death
item.description: ‘Maddie and I have drawn enormous strength from how so very loved she was and is.’

item.title: Magda Szubanski unwittingly becomes face of online health scam amid cancer remission
item.description: ‘She’s being used just like me.’

item.title: Desperate search for five-year-old girl believed abducted from NT home
item.description: Sharon vanished overnight from her home after being put to bed just hours earlier.

item.description: ‘It’s very intimidating and can feel really scary.’

item.description: The tribute was underscored by a rap song telling girls to ‘put that ass in the air’.

item.description: People who were at listed locations are being told to stay alert to symptoms.

item.description: The coach offered to consider his position after hurting his Indigenous players with the remark.

item.description: The respected medical professional is also considering his legal options as the investigation continues.

item.description: ‘As a mother, you put everybody else in front of yourself ... Don’t dismiss even the smallest symptoms.’

item.description: The drones hit residential neighbourhoods and civilian infrastructure in a key Black Sea port city.

item.title: Cash Out Day: Aussies urged to make ATM withdrawal in message to banks that ‘we don’t want to lose access to cash’
item.description: A grassroots push is about to go into overdrive, as the number of ATMs and bank branches continues to tumble.

item.title: Coalition to double fuel reserves in new plan to strengthen Australia’s supply chains
item.description: The proposal includes setting up an $800 million facility to deliver at least one billion litres of new onshore storage.

item.description: ‘I’m really happy to say it was an accurate story.’

item.description: Attendees at the black-tie gathering were sent scrambling.

item.description: Emergency services were alerted to the incident late Monday night.

item.description: The incident followed an altercation between the driver and a group of riders.

item.description: The 35-year-old has continued his hot form since returning from injury.

item.description: Their arrival comes as much of the capital remains on edge in the wake of Saturday’s White House shooting.

item.description: Motorists have two months to apply for the rebate before it closes. Here is everything you need to know.

item.description: Indianna has made it to the big time a year after falling heartbreakingly short.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates:
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: 2026 Hyundai Ioniq 5 review
item.description: The Hyundai Ioniq 5 is still a cool, quirky player in a world of bland EVs – but that doesn't mean all variants make sense.

item.title: Major road closed after two trucks crash, catch fire near Toowoomba
item.description: The Queensland road is expected to remain closed for several hours.

item.title: GWM still thinks EVs are better off small, but promises “more conventionally styled” ones
item.description: The boss of GWM believes electric power is best kept for smaller, city-focused vehicles, but promises to launch EVs with less quirky styling.

item.title: Leapmotor B05 Ultra: Electric GTI chaser revealed in Beijing
item.description: The Golf-sized Leapmotor B05 has gained a hotter Ultra model ahead of the hatchback's launch in Europe and potentially other export markets.

item.title: Collingwood’s special guernsey for Scott Pendlebury’s record-breaking game smashed by fans: ‘Cringe’
item.description: ‘Thought footy was a team sport?????’

item.title: Melbourne cafe waitress has plates smashed in face in shocking random assault
item.description: CCTV shows a woman walking past a cafe staff member and smacks three plates of food out of her hands.
